What Is This Product? (150-200 words):
Electropolished pipe and fittings are precision-finished stainless steel products designed for applications where cleanliness, corrosion resistance and surface smoothness are critical. During electropolishing, a controlled electrochemical process removes microscopic surface irregularities, producing a bright, passive and contamination-resistant finish. These products are widely used in pharmaceutical manufacturing, biotechnology, food processing, dairy plants, semiconductor facilities and high-purity process systems.

Sakshi Forge supplies electropolished pipes and fittings in SS304L and SS316L grades with consistent internal surface finish, dimensional accuracy and complete material traceability. Products are available in various sizes, schedules and end connections including butt weld, tri-clamp and orbital welding compatible designs. Every product undergoes strict quality inspection to ensure compliance with international standards and demanding industrial environments.
